creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
makc        2010-09-10 20:16:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Added files:
    audio/spek           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Add new port audio/spek:
  
  Spek helps to analyse your audio files by showing their spectrogram.
  Spek supports all popular lossy and lossless audio file formats.
  
  WWW:    http://www.spek-project.org/
  
  PR:             ports/150381
  Submitted by:   Alexander Kojevnikov <alexander at kojevnikov.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1       +28 -0     ports/audio/spek/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/audio/spek/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/audio/spek/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +25 -0     ports/audio/spek/pkg-plist (new)
